jp: 電車はちょうど出たところだ．
大変だ．(My goodness!) 自転車のかぎをなくしてしまった．
model: My goodness!  I’ve lost the key to my bike.

jp: 私は清水寺に3回行ったことがあります．
私たちは昨年から（ずっと）千葉に住んでいます．
model: We have lived in Chiba since last year.

jp: ナミは3日間ずっと学校を休んでいます．
model: Nami has been absent from school for three days.

jp: 私は3日間家族と青森を旅行しています．
model: I’ve been traveling in Aomori with my family for three days.

jp: 私たちがホールに着いたとき，パーティーはすでに終わっていた．
model: The party had already finished when we got to the hall.
alts: The party had already finished when we arrived at the hall.|When we got to the hall, the party had already finished.|When we arrived at the hall, the party had already finished.

jp: その日まで，エリックは雪が降るのを見たことがなかった．
model: Eric hadn’t seen a snowfall until that day.
alts: Until that day, Eric hadn't seen a snowfall.|hadn't=>had never|a snowfall=>it snow|a snowfall=>snow fall|until=>till

jp: 共同で事業を始めたとき，彼らは15年来の知り合いだった．
model: They had known each other for 15 years when they started their business together.
alts: When they started their business together, they had known each other for 15 years.|15=>fifteen|started=>began

jp: 私はその前の日に買った腕時計をなくした．
model: I lost the watch I had bought the day before.
alts: I lost the watch that I had bought the day before.

jp: あなたがたが昨日ここに来られるまで，3日間ずっと雨が降っていました．
model: It had been raining for three days before you came here yesterday.
alts: Before you came here yesterday, it had been raining for three days.|※untilだと着いたその時という感じ

jp: 来週の今ごろまでには私たちはその仕事を終えているでしょう．
model: By this time next week we will have finished the job.
alts: We will have finished the job by this time next week.|we will=>we'll

jp: この本をもう1度読めば，3回読んだことになります．
model: If I read this book again, I’ll have read it three times.
alts: I’ll have read this book three times if I read it again.|I'll=>I will

jp: 来月で，私たちは10年間ここで暮らしたことになります．
model: We will have lived here for ten years next month.
alts: Next month, we will have lived here for ten years.|We will=>We'll
